lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, keep your eyes open. The mission depends on stealth.

localizedText.en: Snake, keep your eyes open. The mission depends on stealth.
localizedText.fr: Snake, ici Campbell. Est-ce que tu me reçois ?

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. I’ll keep moving.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Use the Codec if you need mission support or a reminder of the objective.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, this is a priority call. Check your surroundings before advancing.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: What am I looking for?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Security patrols, cameras, and locked access points. Your Codec memory will be updated as contacts are discovered.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, your first objective is simple: enter the dock area and recover a Level 1 keycard.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: And after that?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Reach the cargo elevator. Avoid unnecessary alerts. This is still an infiltration mission.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, you’ve been spotted. Break line of sight and find cover.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: They’re already moving.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Crouching reduces your profile. If you can neutralize a guard quietly, do it before reinforcements arrive.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Good. That keycard should get you through the first security lock.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Where’s the extraction point?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Proceed to the cargo elevator at the far end of the dock.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Objective complete. The Side Ops prototype is responding correctly.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So the Codec integration works.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: For now, yes. Next step: enemies, cameras, weapons, and rank calculation.

title: Save Contact

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Snake, your simulation state is stored locally in this build.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So the mission data stays on this machine?

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Exactly. Your memory contacts, history and settings are saved by the local save engine.

topicDescription: Record or restore Codec simulation data.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, security systems usually follow simple patterns. Watch cameras before you move.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Any way to shut them down?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Later builds can add chaff grenades, terminals, and destructible camera nodes.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Snake, if your condition drops too low, use a ration before engaging again.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I can still move.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Movement isn’t the same as combat readiness. Stay alive first.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Snake, weapons should be used with discipline. Noise changes the entire tactical situation.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So keep it quiet unless I have no choice.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Exactly. Future Side Ops passes should separate lethal, non-lethal, explosive and electronic tools.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Snake, speed is useful, but rhythm wins infiltration. Observe, then move.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll keep that in mind.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: Snake, some routes are safer if you move low and wait for patrols to turn.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Copy that.

lines.speaker: unknown
lines.text: Snake... this channel is not secure.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: unknown
lines.text: A warning is all you need for now.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, the chaff is disrupting local electronics. Cameras should lose their lock for a short window.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Then I move while the signal is dirty.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Exactly. It will not last long, so do not waste the opening.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: That camera node is down. Any patrol nearby may still react to the noise, so keep moving.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: One less eye on the route.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Good work. A non-lethal takedown keeps the mission cleaner than an open firefight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: As long as he stays down long enough.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Do not count on the base staying quiet forever. Keep advancing.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Snake, your vitals just collapsed. The simulation is marking this as mission failed.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Next run, use rations earlier and avoid trading shots during alert phase.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, security is starting to notice something. Slow down and break their line of sight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So it is not a full alert yet.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Right. Crouch, wait for the patrol to turn, or use cover before suspicion reaches alert status.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: They lost direct contact, but the alert is not over. Keep moving and stay out of sight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will wait until the search cools down.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Caution means the enemy is tense. Do not sprint back into their patrol route.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Observe, then move.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Exactly. Let the meter drain before pushing forward.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, reinforcements are moving into the dock. Avoid a prolonged firefight.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: How many?

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Enough to compromise the mission if you stay exposed. Hide, isolate them, or reach the objective.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, the searchlight does not need a camera lock. If it sweeps over you, suspicion will climb.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Will chaff help?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: For this simulation, yes. Chaff disrupts the electronic tracking long enough to cross.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, that armored captain is holding the extraction route. Do not try to run past him.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Armor is thick. I will need to keep moving.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Use the gaps after his shots. CQC can stagger him, but it is risky at close range.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Snake, his movement pattern changed. The armor is compromised, but his adrenaline response is spiking.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So he gets faster when wounded.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Exactly. Do not trade hits. Break line of fire and use the crates as cover.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Good work, Snake. The captain is down and the cargo elevator route is open.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I am heading for extraction.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Stay sharp until the mission clear signal. Reinforcements may still be in the area.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, that object is not part of the main route. It looks like hidden simulation data.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: A collectible?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Think of it as a codec archive fragment. Find all of them for a cleaner debrief score.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Solid Snake, this is Campbell. Keep the radio open and confirm every objective.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Copy. I will use the frequency memory when I need orders.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: The MSX pack keeps the display minimal: frequency, text, and mission discipline.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Snake, survival starts before the first shot. Observe patrols before you move.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Old-school rules, then.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Exactly. Fewer panels, more attention. That is the MSX way.

lines.speaker: kasler
lines.text: Snake, if you meet a mercenary, study the weapon pattern before committing.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Weakness first. Trigger second.

lines.speaker: kasler
lines.text: Good. Boss data should live in this channel later.

lines.speaker: holly
lines.text: The stronghold layout is easier to read if you treat every room as a puzzle.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Any route you recommend?

lines.speaker: holly
lines.text: Check access locks and elevators before wasting ammunition.

lines.speaker: jacobsen
lines.text: Snake, even the environment can become equipment if you understand it.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I thought this was a radio channel.

lines.speaker: jacobsen
lines.text: It is. And every good radio needs one strange expert.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, this line is for technical support and stage guidance.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: You watching the feed?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: As much as the simulation allows. The MGS2 pack uses cleaner blue panels and priority call rules.

lines.speaker: colonel
lines.text: Raiden, confirm the mission area and proceed according to instructions.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: Understood.

lines.speaker: colonel
lines.text: This visual pack is calibrated for Big Shell style support: clean data, cold colors, precise commands.

title: Rose Save Line

lines.speaker: rose
lines.text: Jack, this channel is reserved for saving mission data.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: Save the current simulation state.

lines.speaker: rose
lines.text: Local data is stored by the app save engine. Try not to ignore high-priority CALL signs.

topicDescription: Record or restore Codec simulation data.

lines.speaker: major_zero
lines.text: Snake, this is Major Zero. Use the radio whenever you need mission guidance.

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Copy, Major.

lines.speaker: major_zero
lines.text: The MGS3 pack should feel warmer, rougher, and more analog than the Shadow Moses Codec.

title: Para-Medic Save Line

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Snake, this is the save line. Want to record your progress?

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Go ahead.

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Simulation state saved locally. Later we can add food, movies, and injury-specific calls.

topicDescription: Record or restore Codec simulation data.

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Snake, tell me what you found. Animal? Plant? Wound?

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Right now, just the radio interface.

lines.speaker: para_medic
lines.text: Then start with the basics: warm field colors, analog signal bars, and survival labels.

lines.speaker: the_boss
lines.text: Jack, equipment is only useful if your body knows what to do with it.

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: the_boss
lines.text: Then build the mission around technique, not just weapons.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, this modern pack is a simulation layer for battlefield support.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Looks cleaner than the old Codec.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: More cinematic, more tactical tags, less monochrome. But the core is still support communication.

lines.speaker: drebin
lines.text: Old Snake, battlefield hardware is all about flow. Supply, ID locks, and timing.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: You selling me something?

lines.speaker: drebin
lines.text: For now, just a future weapon database module.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Boss, check the iDroid. Mission intel, extraction, and Mother Base data belong in this deck.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: Understood.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: No classic Codec frequency here: this pack treats the number as a simulation channel.

lines.speaker: ocelot
lines.text: Boss, keep it flexible. Scout, mark, extract, adapt.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: And if things go loud?

lines.speaker: ocelot
lines.text: Then make sure the player had a choice before the alarm.

lines.speaker: vr_instructor
lines.text: Simulation ready. Objective: learn the system before chasing perfect rank.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: What are the rules?

lines.speaker: vr_instructor
lines.text: No excuses. No wasted movement. Score, route, repeat.

lines.speaker: colonel_ai
lines.text: Raiden, the mission is proceeding normally. Disregard the contradiction.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: What contradiction?

lines.speaker: colonel_ai
lines.text: The answer was already saved before the question was asked. Continue the simulation.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, this side simulation is using the tanker layout pack. Rain, narrow decks, and security cameras will make the route less forgiving.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Objective?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Recover the bulkhead keycard, get through the cargo access lock, and sabotage the commander controlling the exit route.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, they triggered a deck-wide alert. The patrol pattern is going to tighten fast.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I noticed.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Break line of sight. The rain makes visibility unstable, but the searchlights will still catch you if you run straight through.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: That keycard should open the bulkhead lock ahead.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Any surprises?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Expect cameras near the door. Chaff is your safest opening if you want to preserve a no-alert run.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, your vitals are dropping. Use a ration before you push into the hold.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I can keep moving.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: You can, but one burst from the commander will end the mission. Recover first, then advance.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake? Snake! The signal is flat. Simulation failed.

lines.speaker: system
lines.text: Side Ops note: retry from mission select or use ENTER on the failure scene.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Cargo route clear. Good work, Snake.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Upload the run data.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Done. Ranking, secrets, and alert history are stored locally for this mission pack.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Chaff is scrambling the camera and searchlight controllers. It will not stop human patrols, so keep moving.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Camera feed is down. That helps, but the impact noise may still draw a patrol.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Quiet takedown confirmed. CQC is still your cleanest option when the rain hides your approach.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: They are getting suspicious. Slow down, crouch, or break the sightline before it becomes an alert.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: You are out of direct sight. Stay hidden until their search pattern cools down.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: They are still on caution. The deck route is open, but every guard will react faster now.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Reinforcements are entering from the deck edge. Do not get pinned between them and the commander arena.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Camera cone ahead. You can time the sweep, destroy it, or throw chaff for a safer pass.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: That searchlight is scanning the deck. Crouching helps, but chaff gives you the cleanest window.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Snake, the commander is using a shielded firing pattern. Do not stay in front of him for long.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Weak point?

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Force him to reposition, then punish the recovery window. CQC works, but only if you accept a counter-hit risk.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: His pattern changed. He is firing faster now. Use the crates and avoid trading shots.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Commander neutralized. Cargo hold exit is open.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Heading out.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: You found a hidden tanker archive fragment. I am tagging it for the Tape Deck and Lore database.

title: Objective Review
topicDescription: Review the current route and mission priority.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Snake, review the objective before moving. Reach the next secured sector without turning the base into a battlefield.

localizedText.en: Snake, review the objective before moving. Reach the next secured sector without turning the base into a battlefield.
localizedText.fr: Snake, revois ton objectif avant d’avancer. Atteins le prochain secteur sécurisé sans transformer la base en champ de bataille.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. Infiltration first.

localizedText.en: Understood. Infiltration first.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Infiltration en priorité.

title: Alert Protocol
topicDescription: Review suspicion, alert, evasion and caution procedure.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: If security reaches full alert, break line of sight before trying to advance. Evasion is not the same as safety.

localizedText.en: If security reaches full alert, break line of sight before trying to advance. Evasion is not the same as safety.
localizedText.fr: Si la sécurité passe en alerte maximale, brise la ligne de vue avant de progresser. L’évasion ne signifie pas que tu es en sécurité.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I wait for caution to clear, then move.

localizedText.en: I wait for caution to clear, then move.
localizedText.fr: J’attends la fin de la phase de prudence, puis j’avance.

title: Condition Check
topicDescription: Request a general field condition assessment.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Snake, fatigue and injury reduce your margin for error before they stop you outright. Treat damage early.

localizedText.en: Snake, fatigue and injury reduce your margin for error before they stop you outright. Treat damage early.
localizedText.fr: Snake, la fatigue et les blessures réduisent ta marge d’erreur avant même de t’arrêter. Soigne-toi tôt.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will monitor my condition.

localizedText.en: I will monitor my condition.
localizedText.fr: Je vais surveiller mon état.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: The Codec network can attach biological notes to a mission context, but those notes should never replace field observation.

localizedText.en: The Codec network can attach biological notes to a mission context, but those notes should never replace field observation.
localizedText.fr: Le réseau Codec peut joindre des notes biologiques au contexte de mission, mais elles ne doivent jamais remplacer l’observation sur le terrain.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Data is useful only if it matches what is in front of me.

localizedText.en: Data is useful only if it matches what is in front of me.
localizedText.fr: Les données ne servent que si elles correspondent à ce que j’ai devant moi.

title: Security Systems
topicDescription: Cameras, access locks and electronic patrol systems.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Security devices are predictable when you watch a full cycle. Cameras, lights and locks all reveal timing.

localizedText.en: Security devices are predictable when you watch a full cycle. Cameras, lights and locks all reveal timing.
localizedText.fr: Les dispositifs de sécurité sont prévisibles si tu observes un cycle complet. Caméras, projecteurs et verrous révèlent tous leur rythme.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Then I study the pattern before crossing.

localizedText.en: Then I study the pattern before crossing.
localizedText.fr: Alors j’étudie le rythme avant de traverser.

title: Nuclear Hardware
topicDescription: Nuclear systems, containment and military hardware.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Treat every nuclear storage area as both a weapons site and an industrial hazard. One careless shot can change the mission.

localizedText.en: Treat every nuclear storage area as both a weapons site and an industrial hazard. One careless shot can change the mission.
localizedText.fr: Considère chaque zone de stockage nucléaire comme un site d’armes et un danger industriel. Un seul tir imprudent peut changer la mission.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: No stray rounds near sensitive hardware.

localizedText.en: No stray rounds near sensitive hardware.
localizedText.fr: Pas de tir perdu près du matériel sensible.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: A quiet route is not always the shortest route. Let the patrol move, then take the space it leaves behind.

localizedText.en: A quiet route is not always the shortest route. Let the patrol move, then take the space it leaves behind.
localizedText.fr: Un itinéraire discret n’est pas toujours le plus court. Laisse la patrouille avancer, puis prends l’espace qu’elle libère.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Use their movement against them.

localizedText.en: Use their movement against them.
localizedText.fr: Utiliser leurs déplacements contre eux.

title: Local Intel
topicDescription: Nearby patrol routes and access points.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: The guards trust the main corridor. That makes the maintenance route slower, but safer.

localizedText.en: The guards trust the main corridor. That makes the maintenance route slower, but safer.
localizedText.fr: Les gardes font confiance au couloir principal. Le passage de maintenance est plus lent, mais plus sûr.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will choose based on the alert level.

localizedText.en: I will choose based on the alert level.
localizedText.fr: Je choisirai selon le niveau d’alerte.

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Your first task is to penetrate Outer Heaven, locate Gray Fox, and determine what Metal Gear means.

localizedText.en: Your first task is to penetrate Outer Heaven, locate Gray Fox, and determine what Metal Gear means.
localizedText.fr: Ta première mission est de pénétrer Outer Heaven, retrouver Gray Fox et découvrir ce que signifie Metal Gear.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will establish contact after insertion.

localizedText.en: I will establish contact after insertion.
localizedText.fr: Je reprendrai contact après l’insertion.

lines.speaker: big_boss
lines.text: Procure equipment on site. This operation depends on adapting to the fortress rather than carrying a full arsenal inside.

localizedText.en: Procure equipment on site. This operation depends on adapting to the fortress rather than carrying a full arsenal inside.
localizedText.fr: Procure-toi l’équipement sur place. Cette opération repose sur ton adaptation à la forteresse, pas sur un arsenal complet dès l’entrée.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: schneider
lines.text: I helped design parts of this fortress. Watch for service corridors, false walls, and routes the regular guards ignore.

localizedText.en: I helped design parts of this fortress. Watch for service corridors, false walls, and routes the regular guards ignore.
localizedText.fr: J’ai participé à la conception de cette forteresse. Cherche les couloirs de service, les faux murs et les passages ignorés par les gardes.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Send me the safest route you can verify.

localizedText.en: Send me the safest route you can verify.
localizedText.fr: Envoie-moi l’itinéraire le plus sûr que tu puisses confirmer.

lines.speaker: diane
lines.text: Outer Heaven hires specialists, not ordinary sentries. Observe how each mercenary controls the room before you commit to a fight.

localizedText.en: Outer Heaven hires specialists, not ordinary sentries. Observe how each mercenary controls the room before you commit to a fight.
localizedText.fr: Outer Heaven engage des spécialistes, pas de simples sentinelles. Observe comment chaque mercenaire contrôle la zone avant d’attaquer.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: jennifer
lines.text: I can move through the medical section without raising suspicion. If I find prisoners or supplies, I will mark the route for you.

localizedText.en: I can move through the medical section without raising suspicion. If I find prisoners or supplies, I will mark the route for you.
localizedText.fr: Je peux circuler dans la section médicale sans éveiller les soupçons. Si je trouve des prisonniers ou du matériel, je baliserai l’itinéraire.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: pliskin
lines.text: The structure is open and vertical. Use the struts, shadows, and hanging routes instead of forcing every corridor.

localizedText.en: The structure is open and vertical. Use the struts, shadows, and hanging routes instead of forcing every corridor.
localizedText.fr: La structure est ouverte et verticale. Utilise les passerelles, les ombres et les rebords plutôt que de forcer chaque couloir.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: You sound like you have done this before.

localizedText.en: You sound like you have done this before.
localizedText.fr: On dirait que tu as déjà fait ça.

lines.speaker: stillman
lines.text: Fatman wants the charges to be found. That means the placement itself is part of his message. Study the surroundings before using the coolant.

localizedText.en: Fatman wants the charges to be found. That means the placement itself is part of his message. Study the surroundings before using the coolant.
localizedText.fr: Fatman veut que les charges soient trouvées. Leur placement fait donc partie de son message. Étudie les lieux avant d’utiliser le liquide de refroidissement.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: I will treat every bomb as a trap and a clue.

localizedText.en: I will treat every bomb as a trap and a clue.
localizedText.fr: Je considérerai chaque bombe comme un piège et un indice.

lines.speaker: mr_x
lines.text: Do not assume the voice giving orders is the same thing as the person it represents. The simulation is testing what you obey.

localizedText.en: Do not assume the voice giving orders is the same thing as the person it represents. The simulation is testing what you obey.
localizedText.fr: Ne suppose pas que la voix qui donne les ordres soit la personne qu’elle représente. La simulation mesure ce à quoi tu obéis.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: Who are you?

localizedText.en: Who are you?
localizedText.fr: Qui êtes-vous ?

lines.speaker: emma
lines.text: GW is isolated behind layered security. The virus has to reach the correct node intact or the system will quarantine it before execution.

localizedText.en: GW is isolated behind layered security. The virus has to reach the correct node intact or the system will quarantine it before execution.
localizedText.fr: GW est isolé derrière plusieurs couches de sécurité. Le virus doit atteindre le bon nœud intact, sinon le système le mettra en quarantaine.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: Then we protect the upload path.

localizedText.en: Then we protect the upload path.
localizedText.fr: Alors nous protégerons le chemin de transfert.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: I can record the operation at the latest secure checkpoint. The dedicated save channel keeps this separate from mission support.

localizedText.en: I can record the operation at the latest secure checkpoint. The dedicated save channel keeps this separate from mission support.
localizedText.fr: Je peux enregistrer l’opération au dernier point sécurisé. Le canal de sauvegarde est séparé du support de mission.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Save the mission data.

localizedText.en: Save the mission data.
localizedText.fr: Enregistre les données de mission.

lines.speaker: sigint
lines.text: That device was built for a specific battlefield problem. Tell me what you found and I will explain the mechanism, limitations, and best use.

localizedText.en: That device was built for a specific battlefield problem. Tell me what you found and I will explain the mechanism, limitations, and best use.
localizedText.fr: Cet appareil a été conçu pour un problème tactique précis. Dis-moi ce que tu as trouvé et je t’expliquerai son mécanisme, ses limites et son meilleur usage.

lines.speaker: naked_snake
lines.text: Start with the practical part.

localizedText.en: Start with the practical part.
localizedText.fr: Commence par la partie pratique.

lines.speaker: eva
lines.text: The patrols answer to different commanders, and their routines reflect it. Watch the uniforms and vehicles before choosing a route.

localizedText.en: The patrols answer to different commanders, and their routines reflect it. Watch the uniforms and vehicles before choosing a route.
localizedText.fr: Les patrouilles répondent à différents commandants, et leurs habitudes le montrent. Observe les uniformes et les véhicules avant de choisir une route.

lines.speaker: naked_snake
lines.text: Keep the escape route ready.

localizedText.en: Keep the escape route ready.
localizedText.fr: Garde l’itinéraire d’exfiltration prêt.

lines.speaker: rose
lines.text: Your body is under constant strain, but stress is also affecting judgment. Slow down when the battlefield noise starts controlling your decisions.

localizedText.en: Your body is under constant strain, but stress is also affecting judgment. Slow down when the battlefield noise starts controlling your decisions.
localizedText.fr: Ton corps subit une pression constante, mais le stress affecte aussi ton jugement. Ralentis lorsque le bruit du champ de bataille commence à dicter tes décisions.

lines.speaker: old_snake
lines.text: I cannot afford to stop.

localizedText.en: I cannot afford to stop.
localizedText.fr: Je ne peux pas me permettre de m’arrêter.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: This is not an official operation. Your objective is to stop Liquid Ocelot before he gains complete control of the system governing the war economy.

localizedText.en: This is not an official operation. Your objective is to stop Liquid Ocelot before he gains complete control of the system governing the war economy.
localizedText.fr: Ce n’est pas une opération officielle. Ton objectif est d’arrêter Liquid Ocelot avant qu’il ne contrôle totalement le système de l’économie de guerre.

lines.speaker: old_snake
lines.text: I know what is at stake.

localizedText.en: I know what is at stake.
localizedText.fr: Je sais ce qui est en jeu.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: The virus in your body has changed over time. We need current biological data before anyone can predict who it may affect next.

localizedText.en: The virus in your body has changed over time. We need current biological data before anyone can predict who it may affect next.
localizedText.fr: Le virus dans ton corps a évolué avec le temps. Il nous faut des données biologiques actuelles avant de prévoir qui il pourrait affecter.

lines.speaker: old_snake
lines.text: Tell me the risk when you know it.

localizedText.en: Tell me the risk when you know it.
localizedText.fr: Dis-moi le risque dès que tu le connaîtras.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: Rat Patrol is moving through the PMC perimeter. Do not interfere with our formation unless the SOP link collapses.

localizedText.en: Rat Patrol is moving through the PMC perimeter. Do not interfere with our formation unless the SOP link collapses.
localizedText.fr: Rat Patrol traverse le périmètre des SMP. N’interviens pas dans notre formation sauf si le lien SOP s’effondre.

lines.speaker: old_snake
lines.text: Stay clear of the crossfire.

localizedText.en: Stay clear of the crossfire.
localizedText.fr: Restez hors des tirs croisés.

lines.speaker: raiden
lines.text: I can delay them, but not forever. Complete your objective before the system adapts to my interference.

localizedText.en: I can delay them, but not forever. Complete your objective before the system adapts to my interference.
localizedText.fr: Je peux les ralentir, mais pas indéfiniment. Termine ton objectif avant que le système ne s’adapte à mon intervention.

lines.speaker: old_snake
lines.text: Do not sacrifice yourself for this.

localizedText.en: Do not sacrifice yourself for this.
localizedText.fr: Ne te sacrifie pas pour ça.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: This contract can expand MSF, but every deployment affects personnel, research, and Mother Base. Plan beyond the immediate objective.

localizedText.en: This contract can expand MSF, but every deployment affects personnel, research, and Mother Base. Plan beyond the immediate objective.
localizedText.fr: Ce contrat peut développer MSF, mais chaque déploiement affecte le personnel, la recherche et Mother Base. Pense au-delà de l’objectif immédiat.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: Prepare the team and the extraction plan.

localizedText.en: Prepare the team and the extraction plan.
localizedText.fr: Prépare l’équipe et le plan d’extraction.

lines.speaker: paz
lines.text: An armed force is operating in a country without a standing army. If no one investigates, Costa Rica will become a battlefield without admitting it.

localizedText.en: An armed force is operating in a country without a standing army. If no one investigates, Costa Rica will become a battlefield without admitting it.
localizedText.fr: Une force armée agit dans un pays sans armée permanente. Si personne n’enquête, le Costa Rica deviendra un champ de bataille sans l’admettre.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: MSF will verify the threat.

localizedText.en: MSF will verify the threat.
localizedText.fr: MSF vérifiera la menace.

lines.speaker: huey
lines.text: The unmanned weapons are designed to replace hesitation with calculation. Their sensors, locomotion and decision models must be analyzed separately.

localizedText.en: The unmanned weapons are designed to replace hesitation with calculation. Their sensors, locomotion and decision models must be analyzed separately.
localizedText.fr: Les armes autonomes remplacent l’hésitation par le calcul. Il faut analyser séparément leurs capteurs, leur mobilité et leurs modèles de décision.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: Give R&D everything they need.

localizedText.en: Give R&D everything they need.
localizedText.fr: Donne au service R&D tout ce dont il a besoin.

lines.speaker: amanda
lines.text: My people know the plantations and mountain routes. We can guide MSF, but the Peace Sentinels are watching every village.

localizedText.en: My people know the plantations and mountain routes. We can guide MSF, but the Peace Sentinels are watching every village.
localizedText.fr: Mon peuple connaît les plantations et les chemins de montagne. Nous pouvons guider MSF, mais les Peace Sentinels surveillent chaque village.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: Protect your people. We will handle the patrols.

localizedText.en: Protect your people. We will handle the patrols.
localizedText.fr: Protège les tiens. Nous nous occuperons des patrouilles.

lines.speaker: chico
lines.text: The jungle is full of tracks the soldiers do not notice. Some belong to animals, and some look far too large to be ordinary.

localizedText.en: The jungle is full of tracks the soldiers do not notice. Some belong to animals, and some look far too large to be ordinary.
localizedText.fr: La jungle est pleine de traces que les soldats ne remarquent pas. Certaines viennent d’animaux, et d’autres semblent beaucoup trop grandes pour être ordinaires.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: Mark every location on the map.

localizedText.en: Mark every location on the map.
localizedText.fr: Marque chaque position sur la carte.

lines.speaker: cecile
lines.text: Bird calls can reveal altitude, water, weather and human disturbance. Listen to what disappears when soldiers enter an area.

localizedText.en: Bird calls can reveal altitude, water, weather and human disturbance. Listen to what disappears when soldiers enter an area.
localizedText.fr: Les chants d’oiseaux indiquent l’altitude, l’eau, la météo et la présence humaine. Écoute surtout ce qui disparaît lorsque les soldats arrivent.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: That is useful reconnaissance.

localizedText.en: That is useful reconnaissance.
localizedText.fr: C’est une reconnaissance utile.

lines.speaker: strangelove
lines.text: The Mammal Pod does not merely imitate The Boss. It is an argument about how she would decide when every human option leads to catastrophe.

localizedText.en: The Mammal Pod does not merely imitate The Boss. It is an argument about how she would decide when every human option leads to catastrophe.
localizedText.fr: Le Mammal Pod ne se contente pas d’imiter The Boss. C’est une hypothèse sur sa décision lorsque chaque option humaine mène à la catastrophe.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: A machine cannot answer for her.

localizedText.en: A machine cannot answer for her.
localizedText.fr: Une machine ne peut pas répondre à sa place.

lines.speaker: galvez
lines.text: We need a force that can act without becoming another government army. Your organization is uniquely suited to this investigation.

localizedText.en: We need a force that can act without becoming another government army. Your organization is uniquely suited to this investigation.
localizedText.fr: Nous avons besoin d’une force capable d’agir sans devenir une armée gouvernementale. Votre organisation est particulièrement adaptée à cette enquête.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: Then disclose everything relevant to the contract.

localizedText.en: Then disclose everything relevant to the contract.
localizedText.fr: Alors révélez tout ce qui concerne le contrat.

lines.speaker: mammal_pod
lines.text: The recorded personality is evaluating an impossible choice. The signal carries memory patterns, not a living voice.

localizedText.en: The recorded personality is evaluating an impossible choice. The signal carries memory patterns, not a living voice.
localizedText.fr: La personnalité enregistrée évalue un choix impossible. Le signal transporte des motifs de mémoire, pas une voix vivante.

lines.speaker: bigboss
lines.text: End the playback.

localizedText.en: End the playback.
localizedText.fr: Coupez la lecture.

lines.speaker: code_talker
lines.text: The vocal cord parasites respond to language as a biological trigger. The host, strain and symbiotic bacteria determine whether infection becomes lethal.

localizedText.en: The vocal cord parasites respond to language as a biological trigger. The host, strain and symbiotic bacteria determine whether infection becomes lethal.
localizedText.fr: Les parasites des cordes vocales réagissent à la langue comme déclencheur biologique. L’hôte, la souche et les bactéries symbiotiques déterminent si l’infection devient mortelle.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: Prepare a containment protocol for the base.

localizedText.en: Prepare a containment protocol for the base.
localizedText.fr: Prépare un protocole de confinement pour la base.

lines.speaker: huey
lines.text: Sahelanthropus was not designed to move like this under normal control. Something external is forcing the system beyond its intended limits.

localizedText.en: Sahelanthropus was not designed to move like this under normal control. Something external is forcing the system beyond its intended limits.
localizedText.fr: Sahelanthropus n’a pas été conçu pour se déplacer ainsi sous contrôle normal. Une force extérieure pousse le système au-delà de ses limites prévues.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: Give me the weakness, not the excuse.

localizedText.en: Give me the weakness, not the excuse.
localizedText.fr: Donne-moi la faiblesse, pas l’excuse.

lines.speaker: quiet
lines.text: Quiet has taken an overwatch position. The link confirms line of sight, but she will act without a spoken response.

localizedText.en: Quiet has taken an overwatch position. The link confirms line of sight, but she will act without a spoken response.
localizedText.fr: Quiet a pris une position de couverture. La liaison confirme sa ligne de vue, mais elle agira sans réponse vocale.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: Maintain overwatch.

localizedText.en: Maintain overwatch.
localizedText.fr: Maintiens la couverture.

lines.speaker: pequod
lines.text: Pequod is standing by outside the hostile air-defense envelope. Mark a landing zone when the route is clear.

localizedText.en: Pequod is standing by outside the hostile air-defense envelope. Mark a landing zone when the route is clear.
localizedText.fr: Pequod attend hors de la zone de défense antiaérienne. Marquez une zone d’atterrissage lorsque l’itinéraire sera dégagé.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: Hold until I call the extraction.

localizedText.en: Hold until I call the extraction.
localizedText.fr: Attendez mon signal d’extraction.

lines.speaker: skull_face
lines.text: Your organization built itself from a stolen identity. I only need to decide which language will describe its end.

localizedText.en: Your organization built itself from a stolen identity. I only need to decide which language will describe its end.
localizedText.fr: Votre organisation s’est construite sur une identité volée. Il ne me reste qu’à choisir la langue qui décrira sa fin.

lines.speaker: venom_snake
lines.text: This channel is closed.

localizedText.en: This channel is closed.
localizedText.fr: Ce canal est fermé.

lines.text: This channel is reading the active operational context. Check routes, security patterns, and extraction conditions before advancing.
