topicDescription: Support comments on current tools and loadout.

lines.speaker: patriots_colonel_ai
lines.text: Run a complete equipment check. Match every tool to the terrain and keep one recovery option in reserve.

localizedText.en: Run a complete equipment check. Match every tool to the terrain and keep one recovery option in reserve.
localizedText.fr: Effectue une vérification complète de l’équipement. Adapte chaque outil au terrain et garde une option de secours en réserve.

lines.speaker: player
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: The hostages are intelligence assets as well as lives under threat. Confirm their condition before changing objectives.

localizedText.en: The hostages are intelligence assets as well as lives under threat. Confirm their condition before changing objectives.
localizedText.fr: Les otages sont des sources de renseignement autant que des vies menacées. Confirme leur état avant de changer d’objectif.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. I will verify each one.

localizedText.en: Understood. I will verify each one.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Je vérifierai chacun d’eux.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: FOXHOUND knows how our people think. Expect specialists, not conventional guards.

localizedText.en: FOXHOUND knows how our people think. Expect specialists, not conventional guards.
localizedText.fr: FOXHOUND connaît nos méthodes. Attends-toi à des spécialistes, pas à des gardes conventionnels.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Then I judge each encounter on its own terms.

localizedText.en: Then I judge each encounter on its own terms.
localizedText.fr: Alors j’évaluerai chaque affrontement selon ses propres règles.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: REX is the strategic objective. Do not let the confrontation distract you from disabling its launch capability.

localizedText.en: REX is the strategic objective. Do not let the confrontation distract you from disabling its launch capability.
localizedText.fr: REX est l’objectif stratégique. Ne laisse pas l’affrontement te détourner de la neutralisation de sa capacité de lancement.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will take it apart one system at a time.

localizedText.en: I will take it apart one system at a time.
localizedText.fr: Je le démonterai système par système.

lines.speaker: mei
lines.text: A patient hunter hears the branch break before the prey appears.

localizedText.en: A patient hunter hears the branch break before the prey appears.
localizedText.fr: Un chasseur patient entend la branche casser avant que la proie n’apparaisse.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So you are telling me to stop rushing the patrol routes.

localizedText.en: So you are telling me to stop rushing the patrol routes.
localizedText.fr: Tu me dis donc d’arrêter de foncer dans les patrouilles.

lines.speaker: mei
lines.text: Your mission log records alerts, damage, saves and completed calls. Use it to improve the next run.

localizedText.en: Your mission log records alerts, damage, saves and completed calls. Use it to improve the next run.
localizedText.fr: Ton journal enregistre les alertes, dégâts, sauvegardes et appels terminés. Utilise-le pour améliorer la prochaine tentative.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: No excuses left in the data, then.

localizedText.en: No excuses left in the data, then.
localizedText.fr: Les données ne laissent donc aucune excuse.

lines.speaker: mei
lines.text: This is a critical point. Record the current Codec state before proceeding.

localizedText.en: This is a critical point. Record the current Codec state before proceeding.
localizedText.fr: C’est un point critique. Enregistre l’état actuel du Codec avant de continuer.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Save it. I am not repeating the entire base.

localizedText.en: Save it. I am not repeating the entire base.
localizedText.fr: Sauvegarde. Je ne recommence pas toute la base.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Your nanomachines carry mission support data and let us monitor basic vital signs. They do not make you invulnerable.

localizedText.en: Your nanomachines carry mission support data and let us monitor basic vital signs. They do not make you invulnerable.
localizedText.fr: Tes nanomachines transportent les données de soutien et nous permettent de surveiller tes signes vitaux. Elles ne te rendent pas invulnérable.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I was not planning to test that.

localizedText.en: I was not planning to test that.
localizedText.fr: Je ne comptais pas le vérifier.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: The biological operation surrounding this mission is more complicated than your original briefing suggested.

localizedText.en: The biological operation surrounding this mission is more complicated than your original briefing suggested.
localizedText.fr: L’opération biologique entourant cette mission est plus complexe que ne le laissait entendre ton briefing initial.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Then tell me what is still being withheld.

localizedText.en: Then tell me what is still being withheld.
localizedText.fr: Alors dis-moi ce qu’on me cache encore.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: The cold will reduce your margin for error. Keep moving, but do not expose yourself just to stay warm.

localizedText.en: The cold will reduce your margin for error. Keep moving, but do not expose yourself just to stay warm.
localizedText.fr: Le froid réduit ta marge d’erreur. Reste en mouvement, mais ne t’expose pas uniquement pour te réchauffer.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will balance cover and movement.

localizedText.en: I will balance cover and movement.
localizedText.fr: Je trouverai l’équilibre entre couverture et mouvement.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: REX relies on linked sensor and weapon systems. A disruption in one subsystem can expose another.

localizedText.en: REX relies on linked sensor and weapon systems. A disruption in one subsystem can expose another.
localizedText.fr: REX dépend de systèmes de capteurs et d’armement interconnectés. Perturber un sous-système peut en exposer un autre.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Then I need to create the opening, not overpower it.

localizedText.en: Then I need to create the opening, not overpower it.
localizedText.fr: Je dois donc créer une ouverture, pas le surpasser.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: The storage area limits conventional gunfire. Watch the environment and use tools that will not trigger a catastrophic response.

localizedText.en: The storage area limits conventional gunfire. Watch the environment and use tools that will not trigger a catastrophic response.
localizedText.fr: La zone de stockage limite l’usage des armes conventionnelles. Observe l’environnement et utilise des outils qui ne provoqueront pas une réaction catastrophique.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. No careless shots.

localizedText.en: Understood. No careless shots.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Aucun tir imprudent.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Wolf controls distance and sightlines. Do not enter her field of fire without a plan.

localizedText.en: Wolf controls distance and sightlines. Do not enter her field of fire without a plan.
localizedText.fr: Wolf contrôle la distance et les lignes de tir. N’entre pas dans son champ sans plan.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: You sound like you know her.

localizedText.en: You sound like you know her.
localizedText.fr: On dirait que tu la connais.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The SOCOM is compact and controllable. A suppressor changes its tactical value, but not the consequences of every shot.

localizedText.en: The SOCOM is compact and controllable. A suppressor changes its tactical value, but not the consequences of every shot.
localizedText.fr: Le SOCOM est compact et contrôlable. Un silencieux change sa valeur tactique, pas les conséquences de chaque tir.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will use it only when stealth fails.

localizedText.en: I will use it only when stealth fails.
localizedText.fr: Je ne l’utiliserai que si la furtivité échoue.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The PSG1 demands stability, time and a clear line. Medicine and position can matter as much as aim.

localizedText.en: The PSG1 demands stability, time and a clear line. Medicine and position can matter as much as aim.
localizedText.fr: Le PSG1 exige stabilité, temps et ligne de tir claire. Les médicaments et la position peuvent compter autant que la visée.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Then the fight begins before I pull the trigger.

localizedText.en: Then the fight begins before I pull the trigger.
localizedText.fr: Alors le combat commence avant d’appuyer sur la détente.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The Stinger gives you guided anti-armor capability, but lock time and exposure remain dangerous.

localizedText.en: The Stinger gives you guided anti-armor capability, but lock time and exposure remain dangerous.
localizedText.fr: Le Stinger fournit une capacité antiblindage guidée, mais le temps de verrouillage et l’exposition restent dangereux.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will fire from cover when the sensor opens.

localizedText.en: I will fire from cover when the sensor opens.
localizedText.fr: Je tirerai depuis une couverture lorsque le capteur s’ouvrira.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Cold punishes hesitation. Plan the route before leaving cover, then move with purpose.

localizedText.en: Cold punishes hesitation. Plan the route before leaving cover, then move with purpose.
localizedText.fr: Le froid punit l’hésitation. Planifie ton trajet avant de quitter la couverture, puis avance sans perdre de temps.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Observe, commit, move.

localizedText.en: Observe, commit, move.
localizedText.fr: Observer, décider, avancer.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Do not hoard a ration until after your body fails. Use resources before the situation becomes unrecoverable.

localizedText.en: Do not hoard a ration until after your body fails. Use resources before the situation becomes unrecoverable.
localizedText.fr: Ne garde pas une ration jusqu’à l’effondrement. Utilise tes ressources avant que la situation ne devienne irrécupérable.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Practical advice. Almost too practical.

localizedText.en: Practical advice. Almost too practical.
localizedText.fr: Conseil pratique. Presque trop pratique.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: The Miller channel is compromised. Preserve its history, but do not trust new guidance from this route.

localizedText.en: The Miller channel is compromised. Preserve its history, but do not trust new guidance from this route.
localizedText.fr: Le canal de Miller est compromis. Conserve son historique, mais ne fais plus confiance aux nouvelles instructions de cette route.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Liquid...

localizedText.en: Liquid...
localizedText.fr: Liquid...

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: Mantis turns information and fear into weapons. If the normal rules stop working, change the conditions of the fight.

localizedText.en: Mantis turns information and fear into weapons. If the normal rules stop working, change the conditions of the fight.
localizedText.fr: Mantis transforme l’information et la peur en armes. Si les règles normales cessent de fonctionner, change les conditions du combat.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I will not let him control the whole encounter.

localizedText.en: I will not let him control the whole encounter.
localizedText.fr: Je ne le laisserai pas contrôler tout l’affrontement.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: The snowfield has almost no safe approach. Watch the long sightlines and do not remain exposed.

localizedText.en: The snowfield has almost no safe approach. Watch the long sightlines and do not remain exposed.
localizedText.fr: Le champ de neige n’offre presque aucune approche sûre. Surveille les longues lignes de tir et ne reste pas exposé.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Stay off the line. I got it.

localizedText.en: Stay off the line. I got it.
localizedText.fr: Ne pas rester dans l’axe. Compris.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: The route is collapsing behind us. Keep the vehicle moving and focus on the exit.

localizedText.en: The route is collapsing behind us. Keep the vehicle moving and focus on the exit.
localizedText.fr: La route s’effondre derrière nous. Maintiens le véhicule en mouvement et concentre-toi sur la sortie.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: No stopping now.

localizedText.en: No stopping now.
localizedText.fr: On ne s’arrête plus.

lines.speaker: unknown
lines.text: The ground ahead is not clear. Trust the detector, not the empty snow.

localizedText.en: The ground ahead is not clear. Trust the detector, not the empty snow.
localizedText.fr: Le terrain devant toi n’est pas dégagé. Fais confiance au détecteur, pas à la neige intacte.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Whoever you are, your timing is useful.

localizedText.en: Whoever you are, your timing is useful.
localizedText.fr: Qui que tu sois, ton timing est utile.

lines.speaker: unknown
lines.text: The machine is not the only weapon in that hangar. Watch the pilot, the sensor and the person waiting outside the plan.

localizedText.en: The machine is not the only weapon in that hangar. Watch the pilot, the sensor and the person waiting outside the plan.
localizedText.fr: La machine n’est pas la seule arme dans ce hangar. Surveille le pilote, le capteur et celui qui agit hors du plan.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: That sounds personal.

localizedText.en: That sounds personal.
localizedText.fr: Ça semble personnel.

lines.speaker: unknown
lines.text: The anonymous channel is ending. What remains is a debt between soldiers.

localizedText.en: The anonymous channel is ending. What remains is a debt between soldiers.
localizedText.fr: Le canal anonyme prend fin. Il ne reste qu’une dette entre soldats.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Frank...

localizedText.en: Frank...
localizedText.fr: Frank...

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: A quiet step crosses a guarded bridge.

localizedText.en: A quiet step crosses a guarded bridge.
localizedText.fr: Un pas silencieux franchit un pont gardé.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: The patient hunter chooses the moment, not the noise.

localizedText.en: The patient hunter chooses the moment, not the noise.
localizedText.fr: Le chasseur patient choisit le moment, pas le bruit.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: A map remembers what fear forgets.

localizedText.en: A map remembers what fear forgets.
localizedText.fr: Une carte se souvient de ce que la peur oublie.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: An open door may be the enemy’s invitation.

localizedText.en: An open door may be the enemy’s invitation.
localizedText.fr: Une porte ouverte peut être l’invitation de l’ennemi.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: The shortest path is rarely the safest one.

localizedText.en: The shortest path is rarely the safest one.
localizedText.fr: Le chemin le plus court est rarement le plus sûr.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: A weapon without judgment is another enemy.

localizedText.en: A weapon without judgment is another enemy.
localizedText.fr: Une arme sans jugement est un ennemi de plus.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Cold metal rewards a warm mind.

localizedText.en: Cold metal rewards a warm mind.
localizedText.fr: Le métal froid récompense un esprit lucide.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: The shadow that waits is harder to catch.

localizedText.en: The shadow that waits is harder to catch.
localizedText.fr: L’ombre qui attend est plus difficile à saisir.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: A saved lesson is never truly lost.

localizedText.en: A saved lesson is never truly lost.
localizedText.fr: Une leçon sauvegardée n’est jamais vraiment perdue.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: The loudest victory often hides the greatest mistake.

localizedText.en: The loudest victory often hides the greatest mistake.
localizedText.fr: La victoire la plus bruyante cache souvent la plus grande erreur.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: When the signal fades, trust what you have observed.

localizedText.en: When the signal fades, trust what you have observed.
localizedText.fr: Quand le signal faiblit, fie-toi à ce que tu as observé.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: A locked gate tests patience before strength.

localizedText.en: A locked gate tests patience before strength.
localizedText.fr: Une porte verrouillée met la patience à l’épreuve avant la force.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: The wise operative counts exits before enemies.

localizedText.en: The wise operative counts exits before enemies.
localizedText.fr: L’agent avisé compte les sorties avant les ennemis.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Snow covers tracks, but not consequences.

localizedText.en: Snow covers tracks, but not consequences.
localizedText.fr: La neige couvre les traces, pas les conséquences.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: A second look can save a first life.

localizedText.en: A second look can save a first life.
localizedText.fr: Un second regard peut sauver une première vie.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Information carried carefully becomes protection.

localizedText.en: Information carried carefully becomes protection.
localizedText.fr: Une information portée avec soin devient une protection.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: The best disguise is the expectation of others.

localizedText.en: The best disguise is the expectation of others.
localizedText.fr: Le meilleur déguisement est l’attente des autres.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: A calm hand makes less noise than a fast one.

localizedText.en: A calm hand makes less noise than a fast one.
localizedText.fr: Une main calme fait moins de bruit qu’une main rapide.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Even a perfect plan must leave room for truth.

localizedText.en: Even a perfect plan must leave room for truth.
localizedText.fr: Même un plan parfait doit laisser une place à la vérité.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: The mission ends; the choices remain.

localizedText.en: The mission ends; the choices remain.
localizedText.fr: La mission s’achève, les choix demeurent.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll remember that.

localizedText.en: I’ll remember that.
localizedText.fr: Je m’en souviendrai.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: You have avoided unnecessary alerts. Keep treating every corridor as occupied.

localizedText.en: You have avoided unnecessary alerts. Keep treating every corridor as occupied.
localizedText.fr: Tu as évité les alertes inutiles. Continue de considérer chaque couloir comme occupé.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. Keep the channel open.

localizedText.en: Understood. Keep the channel open.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Garde le canal ouvert.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: You recovered after detection instead of forcing the fight. That discipline matters.

localizedText.en: You recovered after detection instead of forcing the fight. That discipline matters.
localizedText.fr: Tu as repris le contrôle après avoir été repéré au lieu de forcer le combat. Cette discipline compte.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. Keep the channel open.

localizedText.en: Understood. Keep the channel open.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Garde le canal ouvert.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: Your restraint is keeping the operation cleaner than command expected.

localizedText.en: Your restraint is keeping the operation cleaner than command expected.
localizedText.fr: Ta retenue maintient l’opération plus propre que ne le prévoyait le commandement.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. Keep the channel open.

localizedText.en: Understood. Keep the channel open.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Garde le canal ouvert.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: You are conserving ammunition and rations. Preparation is part of survival.

localizedText.en: You are conserving ammunition and rations. Preparation is part of survival.
localizedText.fr: Tu économises les munitions et les rations. La préparation fait partie de la survie.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. Keep the channel open.

localizedText.en: Understood. Keep the channel open.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Garde le canal ouvert.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: You save often. Some people call that caution; I call it remembering your mistakes.

localizedText.en: You save often. Some people call that caution; I call it remembering your mistakes.
localizedText.fr: Tu sauvegardes souvent. Certains appellent cela de la prudence ; moi, j’appelle cela se souvenir de ses erreurs.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. Keep the channel open.

localizedText.en: Understood. Keep the channel open.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Garde le canal ouvert.

lines.speaker: mei_ling
lines.text: You have come a long way through Shadow Moses. Do not let fatigue make the final decision for you.

localizedText.en: You have come a long way through Shadow Moses. Do not let fatigue make the final decision for you.
localizedText.fr: Tu as parcouru un long chemin à Shadow Moses. Ne laisse pas la fatigue prendre la dernière décision à ta place.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood. Keep the channel open.

localizedText.en: Understood. Keep the channel open.
localizedText.fr: Compris. Garde le canal ouvert.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The SOCOM is compact and controllable. Use the suppressor when stealth matters, but remember that no weapon is truly silent.

localizedText.en: The SOCOM is compact and controllable. Use the suppressor when stealth matters, but remember that no weapon is truly silent.
localizedText.fr: Le SOCOM est compact et contrôlable. Utilise le silencieux quand la discrétion compte, mais aucune arme n’est réellement silencieuse.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The FAMAS gives you volume of fire at the cost of noise and ammunition. It is a combat tool, not an infiltration solution.

localizedText.en: The FAMAS gives you volume of fire at the cost of noise and ammunition. It is a combat tool, not an infiltration solution.
localizedText.fr: Le FAMAS offre un volume de feu important au prix du bruit et des munitions. C’est un outil de combat, pas une solution d’infiltration.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: A fragmentation grenade clears space, but enclosed areas magnify every mistake. Check the room before you throw.

localizedText.en: A fragmentation grenade clears space, but enclosed areas magnify every mistake. Check the room before you throw.
localizedText.fr: Une grenade à fragmentation nettoie une zone, mais les espaces clos amplifient chaque erreur. Vérifie la pièce avant de lancer.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: A stun grenade buys seconds rather than victory. Use those seconds to move, disarm, or disappear.

localizedText.en: A stun grenade buys seconds rather than victory. Use those seconds to move, disarm, or disappear.
localizedText.fr: Une grenade assourdissante achète quelques secondes, pas la victoire. Utilise-les pour bouger, désarmer ou disparaître.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Chaff disrupts electronic systems temporarily. Cameras and guided weapons recover, so do not confuse interference with destruction.

localizedText.en: Chaff disrupts electronic systems temporarily. Cameras and guided weapons recover, so do not confuse interference with destruction.
localizedText.fr: La chaff perturbe temporairement les systèmes électroniques. Caméras et armes guidées récupèrent : ne confonds pas brouillage et destruction.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: C4 is stable until armed and devastating once placed correctly. Distance and cover matter more than confidence.

localizedText.en: C4 is stable until armed and devastating once placed correctly. Distance and cover matter more than confidence.
localizedText.fr: Le C4 est stable avant armement et dévastateur lorsqu’il est bien placé. La distance et le couvert comptent plus que l’assurance.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Claymores punish predictable movement. Mine detectors and thermal observation can reveal the danger before your feet do.

localizedText.en: Claymores punish predictable movement. Mine detectors and thermal observation can reveal the danger before your feet do.
localizedText.fr: Les Claymore punissent les déplacements prévisibles. Le détecteur de mines et l’observation thermique peuvent révéler le danger avant tes pieds.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The Nikita can be guided through spaces you cannot enter, but steering leaves you vulnerable. Secure your position first.

localizedText.en: The Nikita can be guided through spaces you cannot enter, but steering leaves you vulnerable. Secure your position first.
localizedText.fr: Le missile Nikita peut traverser des zones inaccessibles, mais son guidage te rend vulnérable. Sécurise d’abord ta position.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The PSG1 rewards breath control and a stable firing position. Medication may reduce tremor, but discipline does the real work.

localizedText.en: The PSG1 rewards breath control and a stable firing position. Medication may reduce tremor, but discipline does the real work.
localizedText.fr: Le PSG1 récompense le contrôle de la respiration et une position stable. Les médicaments peuvent réduire le tremblement, mais la discipline fait le vrai travail.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: The Stinger tracks heat and needs a clean lock. Chaff and obstacles can break guidance, including your own.

localizedText.en: The Stinger tracks heat and needs a clean lock. Chaff and obstacles can break guidance, including your own.
localizedText.fr: Le Stinger suit la chaleur et exige un verrouillage propre. La chaff et les obstacles peuvent rompre le guidage, y compris le tien.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Automatic fire can suppress a corridor, but it advertises your position to the entire facility.

localizedText.en: Automatic fire can suppress a corridor, but it advertises your position to the entire facility.
localizedText.fr: Le tir automatique peut neutraliser un couloir, mais il annonce ta position à toute l’installation.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: Keep your finger disciplined and know what lies behind the target. Shadow Moses contains hostages, machinery and nuclear material.

localizedText.en: Keep your finger disciplined and know what lies behind the target. Shadow Moses contains hostages, machinery and nuclear material.
localizedText.fr: Garde ton doigt discipliné et sache ce qui se trouve derrière la cible. Shadow Moses contient des otages, des machines et du matériel nucléaire.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll use it accordingly.

localizedText.en: I’ll use it accordingly.
localizedText.fr: Je l’utiliserai en conséquence.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Ocelot is a precision shooter who controls the pace of a duel. Use cover and watch his reload cycle.

localizedText.en: Ocelot is a precision shooter who controls the pace of a duel. Use cover and watch his reload cycle.
localizedText.fr: Ocelot est un tireur de précision qui contrôle le rythme du duel. Utilise le couvert et observe son rechargement.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Do not challenge the tank from open ground. Break its awareness, close the distance carefully, and exploit the crew rather than the armor.

localizedText.en: Do not challenge the tank from open ground. Break its awareness, close the distance carefully, and exploit the crew rather than the armor.
localizedText.fr: N’affronte pas le char à découvert. Brise sa perception, rapproche-toi prudemment et vise l’équipage plutôt que le blindage.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: The ninja’s movement is too fast for ordinary targeting. Read the rhythm of the attack and be ready to fight at close range.

localizedText.en: The ninja’s movement is too fast for ordinary targeting. Read the rhythm of the attack and be ready to fight at close range.
localizedText.fr: Les mouvements du ninja sont trop rapides pour une visée ordinaire. Lis le rythme de ses attaques et prépare-toi au combat rapproché.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: Mantis attacks perception as much as the body. If he anticipates every action, change the rules of the exchange instead of repeating yourself.

localizedText.en: Mantis attacks perception as much as the body. If he anticipates every action, change the rules of the exchange instead of repeating yourself.
localizedText.fr: Mantis attaque la perception autant que le corps. S’il anticipe chaque action, change les règles de l’échange au lieu de te répéter.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Wolf chooses long sightlines and forces patience. Stabilize your aim, control exposure, and never assume she has abandoned a firing lane.

localizedText.en: Wolf chooses long sightlines and forces patience. Stabilize your aim, control exposure, and never assume she has abandoned a firing lane.
localizedText.fr: Wolf choisit les longues lignes de tir et impose la patience. Stabilise ta visée, contrôle ton exposition et ne suppose jamais qu’elle a abandonné un angle.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: nastasha
lines.text: A Hind is designed to dominate exposed infantry. Stay beneath cover, force predictable passes, and lock the Stinger only when the aircraft commits.

localizedText.en: A Hind is designed to dominate exposed infantry. Stay beneath cover, force predictable passes, and lock the Stinger only when the aircraft commits.
localizedText.fr: Un Hind est conçu pour dominer l’infanterie exposée. Reste sous couvert, force des passages prévisibles et verrouille le Stinger lorsque l’appareil s’engage.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: miller
lines.text: Raven uses firepower to shape the room. Avoid the lanes he controls, use obstacles, and attack when his weapon limits his turn.

localizedText.en: Raven uses firepower to shape the room. Avoid the lanes he controls, use obstacles, and attack when his weapon limits his turn.
localizedText.fr: Raven utilise sa puissance de feu pour façonner la pièce. Évite les couloirs qu’il contrôle, utilise les obstacles et attaque quand son arme limite sa rotation.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: REX separates detection, armor and weapon systems. Disrupt its sensors first; a blind machine cannot use its full battlefield advantage.

localizedText.en: REX separates detection, armor and weapon systems. Disrupt its sensors first; a blind machine cannot use its full battlefield advantage.
localizedText.fr: REX sépare détection, blindage et armement. Perturbe d’abord ses capteurs ; une machine aveugle ne peut exploiter tout son avantage.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Liquid knows your training and wants the fight to become personal. Keep the objective ahead of his provocation.

localizedText.en: Liquid knows your training and wants the fight to become personal. Keep the objective ahead of his provocation.
localizedText.fr: Liquid connaît ton entraînement et veut rendre le combat personnel. Garde l’objectif devant ses provocations.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll watch for the opening.

localizedText.en: I’ll watch for the opening.
localizedText.fr: J’attendrai l’ouverture.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Bleeding reduces your margin for error. Stop moving long enough to stabilize the wound before the cold and exertion make it worse.

localizedText.en: Bleeding reduces your margin for error. Stop moving long enough to stabilize the wound before the cold and exertion make it worse.
localizedText.fr: Une hémorragie réduit ta marge d’erreur. Stabilise la blessure avant que le froid et l’effort ne l’aggravent.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll monitor it.

localizedText.en: I’ll monitor it.
localizedText.fr: Je vais surveiller ça.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Cold affects dexterity before judgment. Keep moving between covered positions and do not remain exposed while using the Codec.

localizedText.en: Cold affects dexterity before judgment. Keep moving between covered positions and do not remain exposed while using the Codec.
localizedText.fr: Le froid affecte la dextérité avant le jugement. Déplace-toi entre les couverts et ne reste pas exposé pendant l’utilisation du Codec.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll monitor it.

localizedText.en: I’ll monitor it.
localizedText.fr: Je vais surveiller ça.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Use medication for a defined problem, not as a substitute for rest or positioning. Side effects can matter during a long operation.

localizedText.en: Use medication for a defined problem, not as a substitute for rest or positioning. Side effects can matter during a long operation.
localizedText.fr: Utilise les médicaments pour un problème précis, pas comme substitut au repos ou au positionnement. Les effets secondaires comptent pendant une longue opération.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll monitor it.

localizedText.en: I’ll monitor it.
localizedText.fr: Je vais surveiller ça.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Your nanomachines report elevated stress. Slow your breathing and reduce the number of decisions you make while exposed.

localizedText.en: Your nanomachines report elevated stress. Slow your breathing and reduce the number of decisions you make while exposed.
localizedText.fr: Tes nanomachines signalent un stress élevé. Ralentis ta respiration et réduis le nombre de décisions prises à découvert.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll monitor it.

localizedText.en: I’ll monitor it.
localizedText.fr: Je vais surveiller ça.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: I cannot give you certainty over this channel. Continue the mission, but report any unusual symptoms immediately.

localizedText.en: I cannot give you certainty over this channel. Continue the mission, but report any unusual symptoms immediately.
localizedText.fr: Je ne peux pas te donner de certitude sur ce canal. Continue la mission, mais signale immédiatement tout symptôme inhabituel.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll monitor it.

localizedText.en: I’ll monitor it.
localizedText.fr: Je vais surveiller ça.

lines.speaker: naomi
lines.text: Rations restore energy, but timing matters. Do not wait until a single hit can decide the mission.

localizedText.en: Rations restore energy, but timing matters. Do not wait until a single hit can decide the mission.
localizedText.fr: Les rations restaurent l’énergie, mais le moment compte. N’attends pas qu’un seul impact puisse décider de la mission.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: I’ll monitor it.

localizedText.en: I’ll monitor it.
localizedText.fr: Je vais surveiller ça.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Cameras follow fixed arcs and recover after chaff. Time the sweep instead of standing beneath it.

localizedText.en: Cameras follow fixed arcs and recover after chaff. Time the sweep instead of standing beneath it.
localizedText.fr: Les caméras suivent des arcs fixes et récupèrent après la chaff. Observe leur balayage au lieu de rester dessous.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: That gives me something to work with.

localizedText.en: That gives me something to work with.
localizedText.fr: Ça me donne une piste.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Some sealed areas use environmental control as security. Find the control system before your air becomes the timer.

localizedText.en: Some sealed areas use environmental control as security. Find the control system before your air becomes the timer.
localizedText.fr: Certaines zones scellées utilisent le contrôle environnemental comme sécurité. Trouve le système avant que ton air ne devienne le chronomètre.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: That gives me something to work with.

localizedText.en: That gives me something to work with.
localizedText.fr: Ça me donne une piste.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: Elevators are choke points. Listen before the doors open and assume the destination may already be watched.

localizedText.en: Elevators are choke points. Listen before the doors open and assume the destination may already be watched.
localizedText.fr: Les ascenseurs sont des goulets d’étranglement. Écoute avant l’ouverture des portes et suppose que l’arrivée est surveillée.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: That gives me something to work with.

localizedText.en: That gives me something to work with.
localizedText.fr: Ça me donne une piste.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: The PAL key responds to controlled temperature states. The environment is part of the authentication system.

localizedText.en: The PAL key responds to controlled temperature states. The environment is part of the authentication system.
localizedText.fr: La clé PAL réagit à des états de température contrôlés. L’environnement fait partie du système d’authentification.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: That gives me something to work with.

localizedText.en: That gives me something to work with.
localizedText.fr: Ça me donne une piste.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: The storage building limits conventional weapons for a reason. Use non-explosive methods around nuclear material.

localizedText.en: The storage building limits conventional weapons for a reason. Use non-explosive methods around nuclear material.
localizedText.fr: Le bâtiment de stockage limite les armes conventionnelles pour une raison. Utilise des méthodes non explosives près du matériel nucléaire.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: That gives me something to work with.

localizedText.en: That gives me something to work with.
localizedText.fr: Ça me donne une piste.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: REX relies on an external sensor suite to coordinate weapons and movement. Its design creates a technical vulnerability.

localizedText.en: REX relies on an external sensor suite to coordinate weapons and movement. Its design creates a technical vulnerability.
localizedText.fr: REX dépend d’un ensemble de capteurs externes pour coordonner armes et mouvements. Sa conception crée une vulnérabilité technique.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: That gives me something to work with.

localizedText.en: That gives me something to work with.
localizedText.fr: Ça me donne une piste.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Reach the surface without giving the dock patrol a reason to seal the route.

localizedText.en: Reach the surface without giving the dock patrol a reason to seal the route.
localizedText.fr: Atteins la surface sans donner à la patrouille du quai une raison de fermer la route.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Cross the heliport, locate the ventilation access, and avoid turning the open ground into a firefight.

localizedText.en: Cross the heliport, locate the ventilation access, and avoid turning the open ground into a firefight.
localizedText.fr: Traverse l’héliport, trouve l’accès de ventilation et évite de transformer le terrain découvert en fusillade.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Search the hangar for the hostage route and expand your local support network.

localizedText.en: Search the hangar for the hostage route and expand your local support network.
localizedText.fr: Fouille le hangar pour trouver la route des otages et étendre ton réseau de soutien local.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Identify the prisoners, verify the information they carry, and keep Meryl out of enemy hands.

localizedText.en: Identify the prisoners, verify the information they carry, and keep Meryl out of enemy hands.
localizedText.fr: Identifie les prisonniers, vérifie leurs informations et empêche l’ennemi de reprendre Meryl.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Move through the storage building without using weapons that could compromise the warheads.

localizedText.en: Move through the storage building without using weapons that could compromise the warheads.
localizedText.fr: Traverse le bâtiment sans employer d’armes susceptibles de compromettre les ogives.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Climb the tower, survive the pursuit, and restore a route toward the underground base.

localizedText.en: Climb the tower, survive the pursuit, and restore a route toward the underground base.
localizedText.fr: Gravis la tour, survis à la poursuite et rétablis une route vers la base souterraine.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Cross the snowfield carefully. Long sightlines favor the sniper waiting for you.

localizedText.en: Cross the snowfield carefully. Long sightlines favor the sniper waiting for you.
localizedText.fr: Traverse le champ de neige avec prudence. Les longues lignes de tir favorisent le tireur qui t’attend.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Locate the PAL system and determine how the terrorists intend to activate REX.

localizedText.en: Locate the PAL system and determine how the terrorists intend to activate REX.
localizedText.fr: Localise le système PAL et détermine comment les terroristes comptent activer REX.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: Stop REX from becoming operational, then deal with Liquid before he escapes the facility.

localizedText.en: Stop REX from becoming operational, then deal with Liquid before he escapes the facility.
localizedText.fr: Empêche REX de devenir opérationnel, puis arrête Liquid avant qu’il ne quitte l’installation.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: campbell
lines.text: The operation has collapsed into an evacuation. Get out of Shadow Moses alive.

localizedText.en: The operation has collapsed into an evacuation. Get out of Shadow Moses alive.
localizedText.fr: L’opération s’est transformée en évacuation. Sors vivant de Shadow Moses.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Understood.

localizedText.en: Understood.
localizedText.fr: Compris.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: The patrol pattern changes near the cells. I can guide you through once the corridor clears.

localizedText.en: The patrol pattern changes near the cells. I can guide you through once the corridor clears.
localizedText.fr: Le schéma de patrouille change près des cellules. Je peux te guider dès que le couloir se libère.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Stay close.

localizedText.en: Stay close.
localizedText.fr: Reste près de moi.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: I remember enough to know he used me against you. We keep moving; we settle the rest later.

localizedText.en: I remember enough to know he used me against you. We keep moving; we settle the rest later.
localizedText.fr: Je me souviens assez pour savoir qu’il m’a utilisée contre toi. On continue ; on réglera le reste plus tard.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Stay close.

localizedText.en: Stay close.
localizedText.fr: Reste près de moi.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: Do not step into the snowfield like it is empty. She has already chosen where she wants you to stand.

localizedText.en: Do not step into the snowfield like it is empty. She has already chosen where she wants you to stand.
localizedText.fr: N’entre pas dans le champ de neige comme s’il était vide. Elle a déjà choisi où elle veut que tu te tiennes.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Stay close.

localizedText.en: Stay close.
localizedText.fr: Reste près de moi.

lines.speaker: meryl
lines.text: The route is collapsing behind us. Keep moving and I’ll watch the rear.

localizedText.en: The route is collapsing behind us. Keep moving and I’ll watch the rear.
localizedText.fr: La route s’effondre derrière nous. Continue d’avancer, je couvre l’arrière.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Stay close.

localizedText.en: Stay close.
localizedText.fr: Reste près de moi.

lines.speaker: deepthroat
lines.text: The ground ahead is seeded. Watch the snow and trust the detector before your eyes.

localizedText.en: The ground ahead is seeded. Watch the snow and trust the detector before your eyes.
localizedText.fr: Le terrain devant toi est miné. Observe la neige et fie-toi au détecteur avant tes yeux.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Who are you?

localizedText.en: Who are you?
localizedText.fr: Qui es-tu ?

lines.speaker: deepthroat
lines.text: The one you are about to face is not part of FOXHOUND’s plan. Survive the encounter and remember the voice.

localizedText.en: The one you are about to face is not part of FOXHOUND’s plan. Survive the encounter and remember the voice.
localizedText.fr: Celui que tu vas affronter ne fait pas partie du plan de FOXHOUND. Survis et souviens-toi de cette voix.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Who are you?

localizedText.en: Who are you?
localizedText.fr: Qui es-tu ?

lines.speaker: deepthroat
lines.text: The machine’s eye is its strength and its weakness. Blind it before you strike the body.

localizedText.en: The machine’s eye is its strength and its weakness. Blind it before you strike the body.
localizedText.fr: L’œil de la machine est sa force et sa faiblesse. Aveugle-le avant d’attaquer le corps.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Who are you?

localizedText.en: Who are you?
localizedText.fr: Qui es-tu ?

lines.speaker: deepthroat
lines.text: Deepthroat was only a name. You knew me before the metal and the pain.

localizedText.en: Deepthroat was only a name. You knew me before the metal and the pain.
localizedText.fr: Deepthroat n’était qu’un nom. Tu me connaissais avant le métal et la douleur.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: Who are you?

localizedText.en: Who are you?
localizedText.fr: Qui es-tu ?

title: Ray Prototype
topicDescription: Technical analysis of the Tanker prototype.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: RAY was designed as a counter-Metal Gear platform. Photograph every structural detail before the Marines move it.

localizedText.en: RAY was designed as a counter-Metal Gear platform. Photograph every structural detail before the Marines move it.
localizedText.fr: RAY a ete concu comme une plate-forme anti-Metal Gear. Photographie chaque detail structurel avant son transfert.

lines.speaker: snake
lines.text: So the weapon built to stop Metal Gear became another Metal Gear.

localizedText.en: So the weapon built to stop Metal Gear became another Metal Gear.
localizedText.fr: Donc l'arme construite pour arreter Metal Gear est devenue un autre Metal Gear.

lines.speaker: otacon
lines.text: I have the Tanker feed. Your current position and evidence log are stored locally.

localizedText.en: I have the Tanker feed. Your current position and evidence log are stored locally.
localizedText.fr: J'ai le flux du tanker. Ta position et le journal des preuves sont sauvegardes localement.

lines.speaker: colonel
lines.text: Identify Ames without exposing the hostages. The mission depends on controlled observation, not force.

localizedText.en: Identify Ames without exposing the hostages. The mission depends on controlled observation, not force.
localizedText.fr: Identifie Ames sans exposer les otages. La mission depend de l'observation controlee, pas de la force.

title: Command Channel Failure
topicDescription: Corrupted command traffic inside Arsenal Gear.

lines.speaker: colonel
lines.text: The map is no longer the territory, Raiden. Continue the exercise. Complete the role assigned to you.

localizedText.en: The map is no longer the territory, Raiden. Continue the exercise. Complete the role assigned to you.
localizedText.fr: La carte n'est plus le territoire, Raiden. Continue l'exercice. Termine le role qui t'a ete assigne.

lines.speaker: rose
lines.text: Your memories matter even when someone else chooses the context. Decide which part of them belongs to you.

localizedText.en: Your memories matter even when someone else chooses the context. Decide which part of them belongs to you.
localizedText.fr: Tes souvenirs comptent meme quand quelqu'un d'autre choisit leur contexte. Decide quelle part t'appartient.

title: Personal Channel Under Noise
topicDescription: Personal support during the Arsenal breakdown.

lines.speaker: rose
lines.text: The channel is compromised, but the question remains real: who do you want to be after this mission ends?

localizedText.en: The channel is compromised, but the question remains real: who do you want to be after this mission ends?
localizedText.fr: Le canal est compromis, mais la question reste reelle : qui veux-tu etre apres cette mission ?

lines.speaker: pliskin
lines.text: Big Shell funnels patrols through narrow connectors. Watch their rhythm, then move while the next strut blocks their view.

localizedText.en: Big Shell funnels patrols through narrow connectors. Watch their rhythm, then move while the next strut blocks their view.
localizedText.fr: Big Shell canalise les patrouilles dans des passerelles etroites. Observe leur rythme puis avance quand la section suivante bloque leur vue.

title: A Name for the Mission
topicDescription: The field operative behind the borrowed name.

lines.speaker: pliskin
lines.text: Names are useful until they start deciding your actions. Judge me by what I do inside this facility.

localizedText.en: Names are useful until they start deciding your actions. Judge me by what I do inside this facility.
localizedText.fr: Les noms sont utiles jusqu'a ce qu'ils commencent a decider de tes actes. Juge-moi sur ce que je fais dans cette installation.

lines.speaker: stillman
lines.text: Sensor A reacts to the odor marker on Fatman's devices. Slow down when the signal rises and inspect every surface.

localizedText.en: Sensor A reacts to the odor marker on Fatman's devices. Slow down when the signal rises and inspect every surface.
localizedText.fr: Le capteur A reagit au marqueur odorant des dispositifs de Fatman. Ralentis quand le signal augmente et inspecte chaque surface.

title: Fatman's Method
topicDescription: Behavioral analysis of the bomb specialist.

lines.speaker: stillman
lines.text: He wants recognition as much as destruction. Expect a final device arranged as a performance, not merely a weapon.

localizedText.en: He wants recognition as much as destruction. Expect a final device arranged as a performance, not merely a weapon.
localizedText.fr: Il recherche autant la reconnaissance que la destruction. Attends-toi a un dispositif final organise comme une performance, pas seulement comme une arme.

title: Selection System Warning
topicDescription: Classified warning about the operation's hidden controller.

lines.speaker: mrx
lines.text: The enemy is measuring your choices, not only your success. Keep moving, but question every order that arrives too cleanly.

localizedText.en: The enemy is measuring your choices, not only your success. Keep moving, but question every order that arrives too cleanly.
localizedText.fr: L'ennemi mesure tes choix, pas seulement ta reussite. Continue, mais questionne chaque ordre qui arrive trop proprement.

lines.speaker: mrx
lines.text: Arsenal's corridors are controlled by the same system that controls your information. Use the blade and create your own route.

localizedText.en: Arsenal's corridors are controlled by the same system that controls your information. Use the blade and create your own route.
localizedText.fr: Les couloirs d'Arsenal sont controles par le meme systeme que tes informations. Utilise la lame et cree ta propre route.

title: GW Virus Upload
topicDescription: Prepare and deliver the GW disruption payload.

lines.speaker: emma
lines.text: The virus does not erase every part of GW. It damages the control structure enough to expose contradictions in the system.

localizedText.en: The virus does not erase every part of GW. It damages the control structure enough to expose contradictions in the system.
localizedText.fr: Le virus n'efface pas toutes les parties de GW. Il endommage assez la structure de controle pour exposer les contradictions du systeme.

title: Emmerich Family Channel
topicDescription: Emma's unresolved relationship with her brother.

lines.speaker: emma
lines.text: Hal understands machines because they obey rules. Family never did. Get me to the upload point and maybe we can talk without a system between us.

localizedText.en: Hal understands machines because they obey rules. Family never did. Get me to the upload point and maybe we can talk without a system between us.
localizedText.fr: Hal comprend les machines parce qu'elles obeissent a des regles. La famille ne l'a jamais fait. Conduis-moi au point de transfert et nous parlerons peut-etre sans systeme entre nous.
